channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Amazon is experimenting with renaming Echo speakers to Alexa speakers, and it's about time
item.description: Amazon is experimenting with a different Echo name, and it's one that's so perfect I wish they'd just do it today.
item.dc:creator: lance.ulanoff@futurenet.com (Lance Ulanoff), TechRadar

item.title: Fired FTC commissioners sue Trump
item.description: Two Federal Trade Commission (FTC) members fired by President Trump sued him Thursday, setting up another major test of his administration’s expansionist view of presidential authority over independent agencies.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, The Hill

item.title: Everything new on Netflix in April 2025 – including Black Mirror season 7 and Love on the Spectrum
item.description: Excited for Black Mirror season 7? It's just one of the many new movies and shows arriving on Netflix in April 2025.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Modern Military Healthcare: Digital and integrated
item.description: Integrating electronic health records, remote sensing, and artificial intelligence brings efficiency for both patients and providers. The post Modern Military Healthcare: Digital and integrated first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: ClickFix malware tricks you into infecting your own Windows PC
item.description: Hackers are tricking people into installing password-stealing malware by making them press keyboard shortcuts under the pretense of proving they're not bots.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Want Apple's Lumon Terminal Pro computer? It's sadly not for sale, but these Severance keyboard caps are a close second
item.description: Apple has revealed a Severance-style Lumon Terminal Pro computer that sadly isn't for sale, but you can get these replica keycaps from Signature Plastics instead.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: Simon & Schuster wants to be your favorite content creator
item.description: If you were given $100 and five minutes in a bookstore, which titles would you pick? That’s the premise of Simon & Schuster’s upcoming web series, Bookstore Blitz—the publisher’s latest internet-inspired effort to market its authors. And Bookstore Blitz is just the beginning.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Napster sold to tech commerce company for $207 million
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A brand that was notoriously connected to music piracy before reemerging as a subscription music service has been sold to Infinite Reality for $207 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 5 big takeaways from Nvidia GTC
item.description: Now that the dust has settled from Nvidia’s GTC 2025, a few industry experts weighed in on some core big picture developments from the conference.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Waymo plans to bring its driverless taxis to Washington in 2026
item.description: Waymo on Tuesday added Washington to its pioneering robotaxi service's steadily expanding list of U.S. markets, although passengers will have to wait until next year until they can take a driverless ride around the nation's capital city.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Protect your genetic data: Urgent steps after 23andMe bankruptcy
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says 23andMe's bankruptcy raises data privacy fears: Opt out, download and delete data now.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 20 advanced Android 15 tips
item.description: Like many recent Android versions, Android 15 may seem subtle on the surface. And, to be fair, it certainly isn’t the sort of dramatic interface reinvention we’ve seen from Google in the past. But that doesn’t mean it’s short on efficiency-enhancing treats just waiting to be found.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Scary AI-powered swarm robots team up to build cars faster than ever
item.description: UBTech and Zeekr unite with AI robot swarms to make car manufacturing faster and smarter. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how the process works.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GenAI tools for R: New tools to make R programming easier
item.description: My previous article focused on some of the best tools for incorporating LLMs into your R scripts and workflows. We’ll expand on that theme here, offering up a collection of generative AI tools you can use to get help with your R programming or to run LLMs locally with R.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: A European startup scrubs its attempt to launch an orbital rocket on its first test flight
item.description: OSLO, Norway (AP) — A private European aerospace company scrubbed its attempt on Monday to launch the first test flight of its orbital launch vehicle from Norway.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Managing and monitoring user accounts on Linux
item.description: There are a number of commands on Linux that you can use to manage user accounts and monitor user activity. This post provides details on the commands that you need to know if you are managing a Linux server and the user accounts on that system.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Nvidia joins Trump onshoring push
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The 10 telltale signs of AI-created images
item.description: Telling the difference between images created by artificial intelligence and those by humans is becoming increasingly difficult. Kurt the CyberGuy explains what to look for.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
